'''Amara''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He had many enemies, including [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], who once tried to kidnap his son.
